class.name: ResonanceStaticGeometry
class.brief_description: Static acoustic geometry for walls, floors, and other non-moving objects.
class.description: ResonanceStaticGeometry is a subclass of [ResonanceGeometry] for static geometry. It is included in the baked static scene export (Tools → Nexus Resonance → Export Static Scene). At runtime, the static scene is loaded from [ResonanceStaticScene]; individual static geometry nodes do not add themselves when a valid asset is present. Use for walls, floors, ceilings, and other objects that never move. For moving objects (doors, platforms), use [ResonanceDynamicGeometry] instead.
